domain: Punjabi bhangra dhol drum (double-headed Punjabi drum; bass-head with thick skin + dagga curved stick; treble-head with thin skin + chanti straight stick; hand-damping mute for staccato attenuation; Chaal 4-beat syncopated rhythm; phrase-level dynamics)
specific_mechanism: BHANGRA-DHOL-DUAL-DAMP: dual-band gradient attenuation for training stability with phrase-level high-curvature damping. (1) Decompose each gradient g_t into low-frequency g_L (long-time-average baseline) + high-frequency g_H (short-time deviation) via EMA decomposition. (2) Independent attenuators α_L(t), α_H(t) scale each band per phrase. (3) Phrase-level hand-damping: at high-curvature steps (||g_t|| > 2·||g_avg||), apply temporary α_L→0 (bass-mute) to allow precise high-frequency steering. (4) Chaal-pattern: 4-step cyclical schedule where every 4th step α_L=0.5 (syncopated bass-attenuation). (5) Bass-treble balance: gradient_update = α_L · g_L + α_H · g_H prevents bass-gradient dominance during phase transitions.
llm_application: BHANGRA-DHOL-DUAL-DAMP dual-band frequency-decomposition gradient attenuator + phrase-level high-curvature bass-mute + chaal 4-step syncopated bass-treble balance. Differs from R376 QAJAQ-DAMPER (different). R390 SAMI-YOIK (different). R417 VEPS-DECRESCENDO (different). R439 INUIT-IPIIRIK (different). R448 ULKANTUN-DAMP (different). R462 WABI-SABI-PATINA (different). Differs from DAPO 2025 (clip-higher + dynamic sampling — closest, single-band approach not dual-band). GRPO (group-relative advantage — different — not frequency-band). Damping-Factor-Control Frequency Compensation MDPI (circuit-level — different domain). Gradient-Variance Reduction (single-band). Differs by DUAL-BAND HIGH-LOW FREQUENCY DECOMPOSITION + PHRASE-LEVEL CURVATURE BASS-MUTE + 4-STEP SYNCOPATED CYCLE.
novelty_claim: DAPO + GRPO + Damping-Factor-Control + Gradient-Variance Reduction cover variance-reduction + clip-higher paradigm. BHANGRA-DHOL-DUAL-DAMP adds (a) dual-band EMA decomposition + (b) phrase-level high-curvature bass-mute + (c) chaal 4-step cyclical bass-attenuation. Recombination — borderline lookup.
